discussion_posts.name: ehmyitayew
discussion_posts.content: A couple of things that weren\'t clear from the questions:\n- if snap isn\'t called, changes aren\'t persisted. I.e if you for instance you have a set() followed by a get() before any snaps that should result with a 0\n- when getting, you don\'t need to have have the exact snap_id, it is more like the latest snapshot <= snap_id
